title: oenothera claviformis subsp. peeblesii
intro: Oenothera claviformis subsp. peeblesii, also known as Peebles' evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family that is native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Peebles' evening primrose include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Oenothera claviformis subsp. peeblesii can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which are often used to support skin health and promote wound healing.
